prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年青海省理科/物理类最低位次分别为约535→510→370→308→352名，整体呈明显前移趋势（位次数字减小），2021至2024年累计前移约227名；2025年小 幅后移至352名，较2024年后移44名，基准位次约352名；该校在青海省理科/物理类计划：2021年18人、2022年19人、2023年19人、2024年19人、2025年18人；2 026年物理类计划21人，较2025年增加3人，扩招约16.7%，招生名额增加使竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科 中国大学排名近年稳定在第28–33名（2026年排名第33），属于全国顶尖理工类高校，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面（2起事件 ：困难认定争议、副教授言论事件），但影响范围有限；抖音热度评级为"较热"（总排名第33），短视频平台关注度中等；2022年曾出现断档关注信号，但近年未见明显投档异常；信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、仪器科学与技术A-、光学工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，电子信息与计算机 领域学科实力全国顶尖，对相关专业报考有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年热度评级为"高热推荐"，计算机类为"推荐"，核心专业社会热度持续 偏高；青海省2026年高考总人数约48000人（含不确定标记），按近年物理类占比约64.3%估算物理类考生约30864人，较2025年物理类30457人略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；电子科技大学位于四川省成都市（非本省），在青海省招生占比极小（约0.4%），跨省报考属正常竞争格局，无明显地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次352名、2026年扩招约16.7%、本省物理类考生小幅增加、核心专业热度持续偏高及声誉偏负面等因素，扩招使位次后移 但竞争因素部分抵消，预计2026年最低位次约377名，区间320–434名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、网络空间安全、数据科学与大数据技术、人工智能）
- 工科试验班（电子工程类，含电子科学与技术、电磁场与无线技术）
- 集成电路设计与集成系统（国家示范性微电子学院）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（信息与通信，含电子信息工程、通信工程、网络工程、物联网工程、信息对抗技术）
- 电子信息类（智能仪器、智能控制，含测控技术与仪器、自动化）
- 微电子科学与工程
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 电子信息类（光电集成与光网络，含光电信息科学与工程、信息工程）
- 生物医学工程类（2021-2024年招生，2025-2026年未列出）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约377名，区间320–434名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如320名以内）可重点冲击计算机类、电 子工程类等A+学科专业；位次接近区间上限（如434名附近）建议以三档和部分二档专业为主，确保录取概率。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category in Qinghai Province were approximately 535→510→370→308→352, showing a clear forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative forward movement of about 227 places from 2021 to 2024; in 2025, it slightly moved back to 352, a backward movement of 44 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 352; the university's enrollment plan in Qinghai Province for science/physics category: 18 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 19 in 2024, 18 in 2025; the 2026 physics category plan is 21, an increase of 3 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 16.7%, and the increase in enrollment places alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Ranking has been stable at 28–33 in recent years (ranked 33rd in 2026), belonging to the top national science and engineering universities, with strong appeal to high-scoring students; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (2 incidents: difficulty identification controversy, associate professor remarks incident), but the impact is limited; Douyin heat rating is 'relatively hot' (overall ranking 33rd), with moderate attention on short video platforms; a gap attention signal appeared in 2022, but no obvious enrollment anomalies in recent years; Information and Communication Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Instrument Science and Technology A-, Optical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, with top national strength in electronic information and computer fields, strongly attracting applications in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the heat rating for electronic information/communication majors is 'high heat recommended', computer science is 'recommended', and the social heat of core majors remains high; the total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Qinghai Province is about 48,000 (including uncertain marks), and based on the recent physics category proportion of about 64.3%, the estimated number of physics category candidates is about 30,864, a slight increase compared to 30,457 in 2025, with slightly intensified competition; the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province (not within the province), with a very small enrollment proportion in Qinghai (about 0.4%), cross-provincial application is a normal competitive pattern, with no obvious regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 352, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 16.7%, a slight increase in local physics category candidates, persistently high heat of core majors, and slightly negative reputation, the expansion causes a backward shift in ranking but competitive factors partially offset, the estimated 2026 minimum ranking is about 377, with a range of 320–434.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Engineering, including Electronic Science and Technology, Electromagnetic Field and Wireless Technology)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems (National Model Microelectronics College)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information (Information and Communication, including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Network Engineering, Internet of Things Engineering, Information Countermeasure Technology)
- Electronic Information (Intelligent Instruments, Intelligent Control, including Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Automation)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Optoelectronic Integration and Optical Networks, including Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Information Engineering)
- Biomedical Engineering (enrolled from 2021-2024, not listed for 2025-2026)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 377, range 320–434. Within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 as safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 320), focus on impacting A+ discipline majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Engineering; if the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 434), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 and some Tier 2 majors to ensure admission probability.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China
